final:
module RefModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire rstn,
    input wire load,
    input wire [7:0] data_in,
    input wire shift_in,
    output reg [7:0] data_out
);

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or negedge rstn or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (!rstn) begin
            data_out <= 8'b00000000;
        end else if (load) begin
            data_out <= data_in;
        end else begin
            data_out <= {data_out[6:0], shift_in};
        end
    end
    
endmodule
